title: spec-to-impl-plan input envelope
_note: Either tech_spec_path (standard/full chain_profile) OR fr_path+audit_path (lean) must be provided. Validated at PHASE_1.

fr_path.description: Required for lean chain_profile (no tech-spec exists).

audit_path.description: Required for lean profile — the FR's *.audit.md path.

create_tickets.description: Permission to ASK for ticket creation. Final HALT_BEFORE_CREATE prompt always fires per INV-002.
